dict.source: Zen
Window Settings
Adjust the window settings. Affects all parts except the editor area.
dict.target: 调整窗口设置。影响除编辑器区域外的所有部分。

dict.source: Brightness of window.
Adjust the brightness of the entire form。
Adjust the font of the Window.
Adjust the font size of some parts, including the document directory on the left, the document title on the top, the outline directory on the right, the tag list, and so on.
dict.target: 调整部分区域的字体大小，包括左侧的文档目录、顶部的文档标题、右侧的大纲目录、标签列表等。

dict.source: Close left vault profile.
dict.target: 关闭左侧仓库配置文件。

dict.source: Switch the vault profile to the default bottom.
dict.target: 将仓库配置文件切换到默认底部。

dict.source: Editor Settings
Adjust the editor settings. Affects only the editor area.
dict.target: 调整编辑器设置。仅影响编辑器区域。

dict.source: Hide the Heading prompt in the editor.
dict.target: 在编辑器中隐藏标题提示。

dict.source: Hide the h1...h2... and other small title prompts in front of headings at all levels.
dict.target: 隐藏各级标题前的 h1...h2... 等小标题提示。

dict.source: Hide the Heading bottom line in the editor.
dict.target: 在编辑器中隐藏标题底线。

dict.source: Hide the h1...h2... and other small title bottom line in headings at all levels.
dict.target: 隐藏各级标题中的 h1...h2... 等小标题底线。

dict.source: Open text justification.
Default text is left-aligned. If it is turned on, it is justified.
dict.target: 默认文本左对齐。开启后为两端对齐。

dict.source: Adjust the width of the editor.
Adjust the editor width. The default is 800. The minimum is 500 and the maximum is 2000.
dict.target: 调整编辑器宽度。默认为 800。最小为 500，最大为 2000。

dict.source: The gap of the text paragraph.
Adjust the gap of the text paragraph.
The height of the text line.
Adjust the height of the text line.
Brightness of editor.
Adjust the brightness of the middle editor area.
dict.target: 调整中间编辑器区域的亮度。

dict.source: Windows/Linux
Only valid for Windows/Linux.
Close the translucent window.
Turn off the window translucency of Windows/Linux. It is only effective for Windows/Linux.
dict.target: 关闭 Windows/Linux 的窗口半透明效果。仅对 Windows/Linux 有效。

dict.source: Transparency of window background
Adjust the transparency of the form background on the Windows/Linux platform. Only effective for Windows/Linux. Recommended values：For dark colors：0.2. For light colors：0.15.
dict.target: 调整 Windows/Linux 平台上表单背景的透明度。仅对 Windows/Linux 有效。推荐值：深色：0.2。浅色：0.15。

dict.source: Brightness of form background.
Adjust the brightness of the form background on the Windows/Linux platform. Only effective for Windows/Linux. Recommended values：0.9.
dict.target: 调整 Windows/Linux 平台上表单背景的亮度。仅对 Windows/Linux 有效。推荐值：0.9。

dict.source: the background picture of the window
Set the form background image; fill the image URL between the quotes; leave blank for no background image by default.
dict.target: 设置表单背景图片；在引号间填入图片 URL；默认留空则无背景图片。

dict.source: Adjust the color of the middle editing area.
dict.target: 调整中间编辑区域的颜色。

dict.source: macOS
Only valid for macOS.
MacOS：The transparency of the window background.
Adjust the transparency of the window background on the Mac platform. Only effective for macOS, and the translucent effect switch is turned on in Settings -> Appearance.
dict.target: 调整 Mac 平台上窗口背景的透明度。仅对 macOS 有效，且需在设置 -> 外观中开启半透明效果开关。
